title: arisaema inclusum
intro: Arisaema inclusum, also known as the tiger lotus or the hooded arum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. It is a type of tropical perennial that is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as promoting digestion and reducing swelling. Arisaema inclusum can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powdered extracts.
